screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Operational overview of utilisation, total resources, active projects, pending requests, upcoming schedule, and urgent conflicts.

screens.name: Resource Calendar
screens.purpose: Monthly/weekly scheduling view with hard, soft, and pending allocation markers plus conflict warnings.

screens.name: Resource Requests
screens.purpose: Submit, review, approve, reject, and track workforce/resource requests.

screens.name: Allocation View
screens.purpose: Staff-vs-day matrix for utilisation, availability, over-capacity, and project breakdowns.

screens.name: Resource Directory
screens.purpose: Manage people, equipment, and rooms with skills, availability, utilisation, and onboarding actions.

screens.name: Notifications
screens.purpose: Show approvals, denials, reminders, conflict alerts, and system updates.
